built with dvg

A lean demo-video generator. Capture, narrate, render — all in pure Python.

Try it

What it does

Capture

Playwright-driven 1080p capture with DOM event log.

Narrate

Single director chooses captions, music, and styling.

Render

libass + ffmpeg. No Chromium per render. Faster than Remotion.

Why dvg

One language

Pure Python. No Node, no React, no Webpack bundle step.

Audio-first

-14 LUFS YouTube target enforced. Sidechain ducking under captions.

Schema-validated

Pydantic catches errors before render.

dvg · open source · MIT
